gitCommit.subject: Fix ICE colors rendering in flushDirtyCells function
gitCommit.body:
Fix ICE colors rendering in flushDirtyCells function

- Modified flushDirtyCells to directly handle ICE vs non-ICE mode rendering
- In ICE mode: render background colors 8-15 as bright colors
- In non-ICE mode: convert background >= 8 to background - 8 with blinking
- Updated both full redraw and dirty cells loops with direct ICE handling
- Updated drawRegion function with same ICE color logic
- Removed unused getEffectiveColors function
- All 253 unit tests passing, 174 E2E tests passing
- Manual testing confirmed: bright backgrounds work in ICE mode, darker backgrounds in non-ICE mode

Co-authored-by: xero <227907+xero@users.noreply.github.com>
